title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at ATS Infrastructure
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
